---
title: "Selvin Carrillo"
image: images/nectarine.jpg


about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round 
  image-width: 15em
  links:
     - text: Email 
       icon: envelope
       href: mailto:selvincar@hotmail.com
     - text: LinkedIn
       icon: linkedin
       href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/selvincarrillo/
     - text: GitHub
       icon: github
       href: https://github.com/selvincarrillo
     - text: Resume 
       icon: file-text
       href: CV_SCR.pdf
---

Ph.D student in the Department of Horticulture, 

[Dr. Dario Chavez Lab](https://site.caes.uga.edu/chavezlab/) - University of Georgia.


![A peach orchard](images/peaches.jpg)
